creator: tim@timit.nl
text:
On Saturday 23 September 2006 23:00, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of audio/py-libmpdclient,
>
> Please note that PR ports/103531 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/103531

Patch looks fine to me. Make it so! :)

Tim
